title: Advanced General Dentistry
tagline: Comprehensive care for every stage of your smile
summary: Routine check-ups, oral exams, preventive care and modern restorative treatment — the foundation of long-term dental health.
description: Our general dentistry programme covers everything from your six-monthly check-up to early decay management and personalised home-care advice. Every visit begins with a thorough exam and an honest, easy-to-understand treatment plan.

title: Orthodontics
summary: From traditional braces to clear aligners — discreet, predictable tooth alignment for teens and adults.
description: Dr. Muhammad Faizan holds a Certificate in Orthodontics and offers the full alignment spectrum. Treatment plans are designed individually after careful records, x-rays and clinical assessment.
benefits: Personalised retention to lock in your result

title: Cosmetic Dentistry
summary: Smile design, veneers, composite bonding and gum aesthetics — built around your natural facial proportions.
description: Cosmetic cases are planned around your face, lip line and natural tooth shape so the result looks like you — only better. We discuss every option and walk you through pros and cons before any treatment begins.
benefits: Honest preview of your final result

title: Full & Partial Dentures
summary: Custom-made removable dentures — full or partial — fitted for natural appearance and comfortable function.
description: Modern dentures are precisely fitted, lightweight and natural-looking. We take detailed records, fit a try-in, and adjust until you're happy with the look, fit and bite.

title: Composite Filling
summary: Modern white composite fillings — strong, mercury-free and shade-matched to your natural tooth.
description: Composite fillings restore decayed or chipped teeth with a tooth-coloured material that bonds directly to enamel. The result is a virtually invisible repair with no metal, no shadows.

title: Root Canal Therapy
summary: Modern endodontic treatment to relieve pain and preserve a tooth that would otherwise need to be extracted.
description: Root canal therapy treats infection or inflammation inside the tooth. With modern instruments and proper anaesthesia, the procedure is comfortable and predictable.
benefits: Followed up with a protective restoration

title: Pediatric Dentistry
summary: A friendly, anxiety-free environment for children's first visits and ongoing dental care.
description: Children's first dental experiences shape their attitude to oral care for life. We focus on prevention, fluoride, sealants and gentle treatment in a calm, welcoming setting.

title: Wisdom Tooth Extraction
summary: Surgical removal of impacted or problematic wisdom teeth, planned with x-rays for a safe, comfortable procedure.
description: Impacted or partially erupted wisdom teeth can cause pain, infection or damage to neighbouring teeth. We assess each case carefully with x-rays and only recommend extraction when it's clinically warranted.

title: Dental Implants
summary: Titanium implants restored with custom crowns — engineered to look, feel and function like your own teeth.
description: Dr. Muhammad Faizan holds a Certificate in Implantology and places implants for single missing teeth, multiple gaps and full-arch cases. Each plan is based on x-ray assessment, bone evaluation and a detailed discussion of options.

title: Scaling & Polishing
tagline: A professional clean for healthier gums
summary: Professional removal of plaque and stains, followed by a gentle polish — for fresher breath and healthier gums.
description: Even with the best home care, plaque and tartar build up over time. A professional scaling and polishing visit removes buildup, freshens breath and helps keep gum disease at bay.

title: Teeth Whitening
summary: Professionally supervised whitening that lightens your teeth without damaging enamel.
description: Professional whitening uses dental-grade gels at controlled concentrations under clinical supervision. Results are noticeably brighter and last significantly longer than over-the-counter alternatives.

title: Simple Extraction
summary: Gentle, non-surgical tooth removal under local anaesthesia — with clear aftercare guidance.
description: When a tooth cannot be saved, a simple extraction provides relief and prevents further problems. We perform the procedure under local anaesthesia with detailed aftercare to support smooth healing.
